violations.description: Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. Observed sliced peppers stored without enough ice to keep it at 41 or below.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Observed single use containers stored on the floor in the kitchen.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Observed drink ice in the handwashing sink.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
